history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle mirror selfie taken from behind of a young person with dark, curly, wet hair. The person is wearing a black t-shirt and is touching the back of their head and neck with their right hand, obscuring part of their face. Their left ear is visible in the foreground, slightly out of focus. The background is a tiled wall, likely in a bathroom, with a faint reflection of a bright smartphone screen being held by the person's left hand. The lighting is dim and appears to come from the phone and overhead, creating soft shadows and highlighting the texture of the hair and skin. The color palette is muted, dominated by grays, blacks, and skin tones, with the bright white screen of the phone providing a stark contrast. The mood is intimate and slightly moody, capturing a candid moment.
